---
title: "AEROBEAR"
categories: [Experimental Rocketry]
#image: "images/TODO.png"
start-date: 2026-12-01
---

TODO: AEROBEAR text

<br/>

| Stats         |                |
| :---          |     :---:      |
| Altitude      | TODO m         |
| Mass          | TODO kg        |
| Total Impulse | TODO kNs        |
| Velocity      | TODO Ma        |
